calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs After Order Granting Special Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Mar-21-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT NELSON ESCALONA, JUANA SOLIS ESCALONA NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS AFTER ORDER GRANTING SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE is GRANTED in the amount of $12,600 (24 hours at $525/hour) in reasonable and necessary fees and $60 in costs. All other costs mentioned in counsel's declaration shall be addressed by a Memorandum of Costs.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Continued To Apr-17-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT NELSON ESCALONA, JUANA SOLIS ESCALONA MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED. Moving party carried their burden and showed that the claims at issue in this motion arise out of protected activity. Plaintiff filed no opposition.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
